ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the data series */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the data series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data series */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data series */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "seasonal_adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seasonal adjustment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the series was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data series */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographic region or area covered by the data series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data series */,
  "last_revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the last revision of the data series */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the data series is currently active */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* An external identifier for the data series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_seasonal_adjustment_id FOREIGN KEY ("seasonal_adjustment_id") REFERENCES seasonal_adjustments ("seasonal_adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the data series the point belongs to */,
  "vintage_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point's vintage */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was last updated */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the data source from which the data point was extracted */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level or reliability of the data point */,
  "flag" TEXT /* A flag to indicate any special conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "is_root" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is a root category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert the unit to a standard unit (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name for the frequency */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasonal_adjustments" (
  "seasonal_adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seasonal adjustment method */,
  "seasonal_adjustment_name" TEXT /* Name of the seasonal adjustment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seasonal adjustment method */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used for the seasonal adjustment */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this is the default seasonal adjustment for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seasonal_adjustment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* ID of the data series the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "hash_value" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* ID of the data series the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "hash_value" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated this account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* ID of the data series being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data series */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data series was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point the annotation is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or annotation text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the annotation was created */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the annotation is private to the user */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the annotation is pinned (important) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
